title: MobSpawnBlocker
description: Simple lightweight plugin to disable specific mobs on the server.
body:
**MOBSPAWNBLOCKER**
- ✅ lightweight
- ✅ configurable

Config.yml:

```
# -----------------------
# Mob Spawn Blocker config file
# author: aphonix
# discord: https://discord.gg/zYVtWxEar8
# -----------------------
# -----------------------
Get Blocked MobSpawn Console Info: false
# -----------------------
# -----------------------
BlockedMobs:
  - WITHER
  - ZOMBIE
  - SKELETON
```
